var.comment: Create constant variable with value - Testlum
var.name: constant

equal.comment: Check that constant variable equals to 'Testlum'
Check that jsonFile variable equals to content from data.json
Check that txtFile variable equals to content from data.txt
Check that expression variable equals to 'TestlumTestlumTestlum'

condition.comment: Verify that generateAlphabetic var contains only alphabetic symbols and length is 10
condition.name: generateAlphabeticCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateAlphabetic var is true

condition.comment: Verify that generateAlphanumeric var contains only alphanumeric symbols and length is 10
condition.name: generateAlphanumericCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateAlphanumeric var is true

condition.comment: Verify that generateNumeric var contains only numeric symbols and length is 10
condition.name: generateNumericCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateNumeric var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with email pattern
var.name: generateRandomRegexp

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 15
condition.name: generateRandomRegexpCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateRandomRegexp var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with pattern for digits
var.name: generateRandomRegexpDigitsOnly

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 10
condition.name: generateRandomRegexpDigitsOnlyCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateRandomRegexpDigitsOnly var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with fixed start/end pattern
var.name: generateRandomRegexpFixedStartAndEnd

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 8
condition.name: generateRandomRegexpFixedStartAndEndCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for generateRandomRegexpFixedStartAndEnd var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with email simple pattern
var.name: emailSimple

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 12
condition.name: emailSimpleCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for emailSimple var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with hexadecimal pattern
var.name: hexadecimal

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 7
condition.name: hexadecimalCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for hexadecimal var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with strict pattern
var.name: strictPattern

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 8
condition.name: strictPatternCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for strictPattern var is true

var.comment: Create randomRegexp generated variable with wildcard pattern
var.name: wildcard

condition.comment: Verify that randomRegexp var generated base on pattern and length is 20
condition.name: wildcardCondition

assert.comment: Check that condition for wildcard var is true

equal.comment: Check that pathFromFile variable equals to 'Testlum'
Check that pathFromVar variable equals to 'Testlum'
